description: Elevate your lifestyle in SOHO by Zenterra! Thoughtfully designed over 2,000SF + multiple outdoor spaces offering room to live, work, gather & relax at home. Modern kitchen w/exceptional storage, s/s appliances inc. gas range, quartz counters & center island. Open-concept design w/distinct living/dining areas incl. a west facing deck, fireplace statement wall w/built-ins & oversized patio door to the yard for seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Upstairs, a luxurious primary suite w/ensuite, 2 additional bdrms & main bath. Lower level offers versatile 4th bdrm/rec-rm, full bath & tons of storage. 600+SF ROOFTOP DECK! w/peekaboo ocean views, built-in BBQ, fridge & speakers. Perfect for entertaining! Dbl garage w/added storage.Club SOHO-fitness centre/party rm/playgrnd. Walk to Grandview amenities
